# MOOT Core Documentation

Use this page as the documentation front door for `v1.0.32`.

## Start here

Start with SubstrateTypes for shared values. Add SubstrateLib for the legal write and lifecycle surface.

| Package | Responsibility | Swift product | Rust crate |
|---|---|---|---|
| [`IntellectusLib`](../packages/libs/IntellectusLib/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Telemetry value types and sink contracts | `IntellectusLib` | `intellectus-lib` |
| [`SubstrateTypes`](../packages/libs/SubstrateTypes/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Shared substrate rows, bitmaps, clocks, and audit values | `SubstrateTypes` | `substrate-types` |
| [`SubstrateKernel`](../packages/libs/SubstrateKernel/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Deterministic hot-path primitives and bitmap operations | `SubstrateKernel` | `substrate-kernel` |
| [`SubstrateML`](../packages/libs/SubstrateML/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Learning, graph, signal, and ranking algorithms | `SubstrateML` | `substrate-ml` |
| [`SubstrateLib`](../packages/libs/SubstrateLib/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Legal write gate, verbs, lifecycle, and integrity rules | `SubstrateLib` | `substrate-lib` |
| [`EngramLib`](../packages/libs/EngramLib/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Typed 256-bit fingerprints and distance math | `EngramLib` | `engram-lib` |

## Other SDK repositories

| Repository | Use it for |
|---|---|
| [`moot-memory`](https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-memory) | Structured memory, vector search, and local RAG |
| [`moot-semantics`](https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-semantics) | ARIA vocabulary and deterministic local classification |
| [`moot-system`](https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-system) | Storage, datasets, queues, sync, telemetry, and loopback HTTP |
| [`moot-core`](https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-core) | Shared types, kernel, fingerprints, lifecycle rules, and memory math |

The full product and public SDK map lives in
[`codedaptive/mootx01-ce`](https://github.com/codedaptive/mootx01-ce/blob/stable/1.0.x/SDK.MD).
